name: WD_ANIM_SENSING
description: Fabric sensing display with intro→loop animation and rotating status descriptions. Shows sensing operation animation with text cycling through detection messages. Uses imgseqopt_Intro_Loop for animation.
visualForm: Centered sensing animation (intro then loop) → rotating description text below showing detection status
descriptionKo: 인트로→루프 애니메이션과 순환하는 상태 설명이 있는 섬유 감지 화면 위젯입니다. 감지 동작 중 애니메이션과 함께 감지 메시지가 교대로 표시됩니다.
descriptionEn: Fabric sensing display with intro→loop animation and rotating status descriptions. Shows sensing operation animation with text cycling through detection messages. Uses imgseqopt_Intro_Loop for animation.
